gemini.aiResponding.description: Displayed when the AI is generating a response.

gemini.askQuestions.description: Displayed when the user is asking questions to the AI.

gemini.browseGems.description: Displayed when the user is browsing existing gems.

gemini.conversationStats.description: Displayed to show the number of words the user used and total words used, e.g., 'asked 3 times | 150 words'.

gemini.createGem.description: Displayed when the user is creating a gem.

gemini.editGem.description: Displayed when the user is editing a gem.

gemini.editingInstructions.description: Displayed when the user is editing instructions for Gemini.

gemini.manageConnectedApps.description: Displayed when the user is managing their connected apps.

gemini.managePublicLinks.description: Displayed when the user is managing their public links.

gemini.manageScheduledActions.description: Displayed when the user is managing their scheduled actions.

gemini.readSharedChat.description: Displayed when the user is reading a shared chat.

gemini.searchChat.description: Displayed when the user is searching a chat.

gemini.startNewConversation.description: Displayed when the user is starting a new conversation.

gemini.talkingInTemporaryChat.description: Displayed when the user is talking in temporary chat.

gemini.talkingWithAI.description: Displayed when the user is engaging in a conversation with the AI.

gemini.thinkingOfPrompt.description: Displayed when the user is thinking of a new prompt.

gemini.viewTheirGeneratedStuff.description: Displayed when the user is viewing their generated content.
